programme.title: Fashionably Yours
programme.desc: Jaded designer Lauren decides to move back home after three years trying to make her career in Seattle. Lauren soon finds out that the city has more to offer then she could have imagined. (2020)

programme.title: Blue Moon Ball
programme.desc: (2022) Romance with Ashley Newbrough and Eric Lutz. While back in her hometown to finish her book, a novelist helps her ex save the town's historic ballroom - but can she write her own happy ending?

programme.title: Love, Game, Match
programme.desc: (2021) Romance with Cristine Prosperi and Dale Moss. New-in-town teacher Liz agrees to help test her students' matchmaking website - so will it be singles or doubles when she meets tennis coach Ted?

programme.title: Falling for the Competition
programme.desc: (2023) Romcom rivalry starring Francesca Barker McCormick and Michael Joseph Nelson. It's mums vs. dads as two parenting groups compete for an award - but will love take their eyes off the prize?

programme.title: Butlers In Love
programme.desc: (2022) Christmas rom com with Stacey Faber. Sparks fly at the American Butler Academy as chalk and cheese students Emma and Henry clash. In learning to work together might they fall for each other?
